initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT AVG(monthly_count) AS avg_monthly_links
FROM (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y-%m', pl.CreationDate) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS monthly_count
    FROM postLinks pl
    JOIN posts p ON pl.PostId = p.Id
    WHERE p.AnswerCount <= 2
      AND pl.CreationDate LIKE '2010%'
    GROUP BY month
) subquery;

SELECT AVG(monthly_count) AS avg_monthly_links
FROM (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y-%m', pl.CreationDate) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS monthly_count
    FROM postLinks pl
    JOIN posts p ON pl.PostId = p.Id
    WHERE p.AnswerCount <= 2
      AND pl.CreationDate LIKE '2010%'
    GROUP BY month
) AS monthly_counts;

WITH monthly_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    strftime('%m', pl.CreationDate) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS monthly_count
  FROM postLinks pl
  JOIN posts p ON pl.PostId = p.Id
  WHERE p.AnswerCount <= 2
    AND pl.CreationDate LIKE '2010%'
  GROUP BY month
)
SELECT AVG(monthly_count) AS avg_monthly_links
FROM monthly_counts;

SELECT AVG(monthly_count) AS avg_monthly_links
FROM (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y-%m', pl.CreationDate) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS monthly_count
    FROM postLinks pl
    JOIN posts p ON pl.PostId = p.Id
    WHERE p.AnswerCount <= 2
      AND pl.CreationDate LIKE '2010%'
    GROUP BY month
) AS monthly_links;

WITH monthly_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%m', pl.CreationDate) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS monthly_count
    FROM postLinks pl
    JOIN posts p ON pl.PostId = p.Id
    WHERE p.AnswerCount <= 2
      AND pl.CreationDate LIKE '2010%'
    GROUP BY month
)
SELECT AVG(monthly_count) AS avg_monthly_links
FROM monthly_counts;
